summary: Tested calendar sync fix: Home THIS WEEK + Calendar events isCompleted now mirrors Schedule page logic using db.log entries. All 5 backend tests passed. Frontend loads correctly with completed sessions visible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar sync fix verified. GET /api/calendar/events?start_date=2026-04-13&end_date=2026-04-19 returns 200, event on 2026-04-15 has isCompleted=true (39 log entries exist). Future dates return isCompleted=false. No backend errors. Home and Schedule tabs show matching completed status. All 5 tabs load correctly.
